summary: Productize district inspector and secondary district list
acceptance_criteria: Productize selected district details for player-facing terrain/economic traits, population, labor, grain, cash, route status, governance, appointment state, actions, effects, and unavailable reasons.
District lists remain secondary browsers with search, filter, sort, folding, rendering bounds or virtualization, and map/selection synchronization where existing read models support it.
All player labels, columns, empty states, tooltips, and reason displays use the i18n foundation; raw reason codes may appear only in explicit dev/debug affordances.
The inspector consumes read models and command previews only; it must not own WorldState, mutate domain data directly, or duplicate sim formulas.
No prototype district labels, milestone labels, raw IDs, state hash, or debug diagnostics are visible in player mode.
Storybook and Playwright or focused UI tests cover English, Simplified Chinese, narrow viewport, empty/error states, no overlap, and no console errors.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001
notes: M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS and must not be rewritten as unconditional PASS or release readiness.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; this task must not create implementation, M7/M8 blocking spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency for manual node battle.
i18n must remain outside sim-core; sim-core emits stable reason codes and context, and the UI translates them.
UI, React state, Redux/client store, and Electron renderer must not own authoritative WorldState; only the simulation Worker writes domain state.
Pixi is render-cache-only and must be rebuildable from read models; React must not manage per-entity Pixi DisplayObjects.
Players and AI continue through the same GameCommand, query, and read-model boundaries; no duplicated domain rules, hidden RPC, or object-graph serialization.
Player/debug separation is required: state hash, revision, raw IDs, raw reason codes, prototype labels, and milestone labels stay hidden outside explicit dev/debug mode.
The zh-CN versus zh-Hans locale-code risk must already be resolved by M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 before localized UI polish depends on locale identifiers.
No server, multiplayer, telemetry, account, cloud-save implementation, release, commercial, branding, production-art, or paid-service scope is authorized.
Stop and route to the named reviewer or Human Gate if allowed paths are insufficient, required tests cannot run, or a Human Gate decision is needed.
human_gates: manual playthrough acceptance where human judgment is required
commercial, release, store, branding, logo, or trademark decisions
telemetry, analytics, remote collection, accounts, paid services, or secrets
arbitrary-code mods, runtime scripting extensions, or Workshop support
cloud-save implementation, network persistence, or any account-backed save service
frozen product, platform, core architecture, technology stack, simulation authority, deterministic, or historical-policy changes
manual node battle reversal or any formal 1.0 scope reversal
